params.name: SAMLRequest
params.description: Base64-encoded and URL-encoded deflated AuthnRequest XML document

params.name: RelayState
params.description: An opaque value used to maintain state between the request and callback. The SP includes this value and the IdP passes it back unchanged.

params.name: SigAlg
params.description: The algorithm used to sign the request, required when using HTTP Redirect Binding with signatures.

params.name: Signature
params.description: Base64-encoded signature of the request, required when using signed HTTP Redirect Binding.

items.docs: Initiates a SAML 2.0 Single Sign-On login flow via HTTP Redirect Binding. The identity provider receives a SAMLRequest parameter containing a base64-encoded and deflated AuthnRequest XML document. On successful authentication, the IdP redirects back to the SP's Assertion Consumer Service (ACS) URL with a SAMLResponse.

Assertion Consumer Service (ACS) endpoint for receiving SAML 2.0 responses from the identity provider via HTTP POST Binding. The SP receives a base64-encoded SAMLResponse containing a signed SAML assertion, validates the signature and assertion, and establishes a session for the authenticated user.

params.name: SAMLResponse
params.description: Base64-encoded deflated LogoutResponse XML from IdP

items.docs: Initiates a SAML 2.0 Single Logout (SLO) flow via HTTP Redirect Binding. Sends a LogoutRequest to the identity provider to terminate the SSO session. The IdP propagates the logout to all other service providers in the SSO session.

Returns the SAML 2.0 metadata XML document for this identity provider or service provider. The metadata document contains entity ID, SSO binding endpoints, certificate for signature verification, and supported NameID formats required for federation configuration.
